title: aesculus × mutabilis var. harbisonii
intro: Aesculus × mutabilis var. harbisonii, also known as the Harbison's Buckeye, is a variety of the Buckeye tree, a deciduous tree native to China. The Harbison's Buckeye has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of the Harbison's Buckeye include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting heart health, making it a valuable addition to a holistic health regimen. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
